title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 15 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 15 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 15 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/12/2023
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate ,a sharp drop in the afternoon. an decrease of 1.37% throughout the day; Traders ship according to market conditions; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 1004-1005 yuan/mt; decreased 7 yuan/mt over yesterday.
